name: decky-wegame
description: A tool to run Tencent WeGame on Steam Deck via Proton/Wine

scripts.dev:electron: npm run build:electron && concurrently "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --linux AppImage
scripts.dist:deb: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --linux deb
scripts.dist:all: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --linux AppImage deb
